analysisWe have 3 players: Justin, Paul, Mitchell. Roles unknown. From transcript, seems Justin claims he was troublemaker. Paul says he was robber. Mitchell says he was insomniac. They swapped? Let's deduce.

Then Insomniac wakes: [13] Justin: All right. This is insomniac by the way. So Justin is Insomniac. He looked at his card at end. So Justin's final card is whatever he ended with after swap. So the remaining roles among players: Seer, Robber, Insomniac, Trouble maker. But we have 3 players, so one of those is not a player. Actually we have 3 players, so 3 roles assigned. The transcript indicates 4 roles mentioned. But maybe some are center. Let's map: Justin says "I was a troublemaker." That could be his original role before swap. So he had troublemaker originally. Paul had insomniac originally. Mitchell had seer originally. So the 3 player roles are Seer (Mitchell), Insomniac (Paul originally), Trouble maker (Justin originally). After swap, Justin becomes insomniac, Paul becomes troublemaker, Mitchell remains seer. So final roles: Justin insomniac, Paul troublemaker, Mitchell seer. No werewolf among players. So all werewolves are in center. So Team Village wins automatically because no werewolf alive. So no one should be voted out? But we must pick a vote.
